title: Global Gizmos Mushroom Table Lamps/Rechargeable Bedside Lamp/Touch Operated Dimming / 3 Different Light Shades / 25cm Height (Black)
features: MUSHROOM LAMP – This modern mushroom-shaped LED table lamp will provide a calming glow for any space it is used in. With its minimalist design, it is charged via the included USB-C cable, and can add character and convenience to a variety of different rooms.

EFFICIENT LIGHTING – The light features the use of energy saving LEDs, ensuring each charge lasts over a long period of time. Choose between warm white, cool white, and daylight, perfect for different times of the day.

TOUCH OPERATED – With convenience in mind, the lamp is turned on by the simplest of methods – simply touch the switch on the lamp’s base to turn it on. Further touches will allow you to cycle between the 3 different colours, or dim the lights in a smooth stepless way with a long press.

IDEAL BEDSIDE LAMP – Measuring 25cm high, with a diameter of 12cm at the base and 15cm on the top, the lamp is the perfect size for a bedside table. Its non-slip, flat base ensures it will stay in place, making it suitable for various different surfaces.
GLOBAL GIZMOS – Global Gizmos has a wide range of unique and entertaining toys, gadgets, and classic games, all of which can be found at the Global Gizmos store on Amazon.
description: Product Description Previous page Mushroom Shape The lamps' mushroom shape provides a look that is modern, classy, and professional in your home. USB Powered Powered by a USB-C cable, the lamp can be utilised in a variety of different rooms and settings. Easy Dimming Cycle between 3 different levels of brightness on the lamp, which also features stepless dimming. Touch Controls The lamp is activated via touching the button on its base, allowing you to switch between 3 levels. Efficient Illumination Powered by LEDs, the lights provide a smooth glow that avoids using a lot of electricity.
